title: Plan was simple. Execution was clean.I’d rather you walk away green than stay and give it all back.
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
Sharing Some Plans and a Review

Call Trigger: Reclaim 712.00

Put Trigger: Below 710.80

Calls → Below 711.20

Puts → Above 711.80

Stop Loss: 711.40

Targets:

Calls 

T1: 712.80 

T2: 713.50

T3: 714.30

Puts 

T1: 710.00 

T2: 709.25

T3: 708.50

Puts ->T1 ->Exit.

No greed. No overtrading.

If I have some spare time, should I walk you through some real-time entry and exit strategies?
